creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Mar 14 11:31:58 2013
New Revision: 314145
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314145

Log:
  - Update to 3.4
  
  PR:		176789
  Submitted by:	William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	naintainer

Modified:
  head/devel/gitolite/Makefile
  head/devel/gitolite/distinfo
  head/devel/gitolite/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/gitolite/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gitolite/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 11:20:54 2013	(r314144)
+++ head/devel/gitolite/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 11:31:58 2013	(r314145)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gitolite
-PORTVERSION=	3.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.4
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://milki.github.com/${PORTNAME}/ \

Modified: head/devel/gitolite/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gitolite/distinfo	Thu Mar 14 11:20:54 2013	(r314144)
+++ head/devel/gitolite/distinfo	Thu Mar 14 11:31:58 2013	(r314145)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (gitolite-3.3.tar.gz) = 123257
+SHA256 (gitolite-3.4.tar.gz) = eadf21918a0da274cb3ed31e6bb7c067155d452ad4b693529ed8fadf8f3dd372
+SIZE (gitolite-3.4.tar.gz) = 127789

-%%SITE_PERL%%/Gitolite/Triggers/AutoCreate.pm
 libexec/gitolite/VERSION
 libexec/gitolite/VREF/COUNT
 libexec/gitolite/VREF/EMAIL-CHECK
@@ -62,6 +62,7 @@ libexec/gitolite/gitolite-shell
 libexec/gitolite/syntactic-sugar/continuation-lines
 libexec/gitolite/syntactic-sugar/keysubdirs-as-groups
 libexec/gitolite/syntactic-sugar/macros

 libexec/gitolite/triggers/bg
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/partial-copy
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile/ssh-authkeys
@@ -74,15 +75,16 @@ libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile/u
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile/update-gitweb-daemon-from-options
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/renice
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/upstream

-@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Gitolite/Hooks
-@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Gitolite/Test
-@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Gitolite/Triggers

-@dirrm libexec/gitolite/commands

 @dirrm libexec/gitolite/syntactic-sugar

 @dirrm libexec/gitolite
-%%GITUSER%%@dirrmtry git
